review_title: Single Pane of Glass for a lot of Cyber Security Areas
description: Also a great team, I have talked to many of them and they listen to us in the community and want to build a new type of tool. Love their approach and the people at Guardz.
author: Andy L.
pros: I really like the Single Pane of Glass approach. It has some really excellent external scans and monitoring, a very good antispam engine, using API instead of a Gateway, has DLP for SaaS applications, and an Employee Security training tool, an Endpoint monitor, an AI phishing kit for Employee Phishing simulation, all hooking into the Microsoft API’s. Some top-level tools into one package along with their nice reports.
cons: It's still a growing product. It was a very mature product when I looked at it, and its grown with additional functions since I started, looking forward to using for our clients more and more.
author_profession: Founder, CEO and Cyber Security Consultant
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One Stop Shop for Cyber Sec
author: Jonathan P.
pros: Single platform for majority of cyber sec needs
cons: 100 user minimum for best pricing. Would like prospect reports prior to 100 user minimum.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: For the most part it has been a good experience and at this point it can give us what we need.
author: Chad S.
pros: Clean and easy to use dashboard for a basic IT user
cons: pricing wish was a little more competitive that way we can land more of the local government
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It has become a very important tool in our cybersecurity
description: I had a very positive experience with the platform, which greatly helped me improve our cybersecurity.
author: Luana S.
pros: It helps to identify issues and provide solutions.
cons: It is somewhat challenging to use, and sometimes it takes a while to update the information.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Guardz has been amazing from my initial meetings with Dor to my existing regular meeting with my customer care representative, [sensitive content hidden]. I am very much looking forward to continuing my relationship with Guardz!
author: Jeff G.
pros: Guardz provides me and my clients the exact cybersecurity protection we need, for service and price. We are all small businesses and I was looking for a partner who could provide me and my clients an enterprise level capability with the personal care an SMB needs.
cons: Honestly...so far I don't have anything negative to say.

review_title: Easy to use cloud-centric security platform.
description: Guardz's all in one platform provides not only end-point protection but the end user awareness training and simulated Phishing campaigns are build in, and you don't need another vendor.
author: Rian B.
pros: The simple to follow "Remediation options" with clear instructions and steps, makes fixing any detected issues a simple process. Guardz does not require a high level of technical skill to administer.
cons: This is not a criticism, but know that Guardz requires a protected user to have a MS365 or Google Business account for integration with email and monitoring.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Being able to make clients aware of situations they face in a clear easy to understand way. Guardz helps me get the message across without the client losing interest.
author: Mike W.
pros: I like the prospect reports to be able to supply a client with something of value without yet having Guardz activated for them. It complements another tool I use to give me a robust offering when meeting with potential clients or existing clients that are not yet sold on this type of monitoring.
cons: Since Guardz uses AI in the security awareness training, I'd like to see it implement a feature for IT Policy creation in the same manner. I'd like to have the ability to select a policy and have AI generate different forms of that policy from Antivirus policies to Cyberthreat Response policies and more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
